sources.note: Maryland Compiled Marriages, Nov 9, 1826, Prince George's MD

notes: 3rd great-grandmother. Born in Washington DC, 1805. Mother: Mary Parmelia Paine (1769-1860, died in Alexandria, VA). Half-brother: John Brannon (1817-1901, born in Albemarle, VA). Married Samuel Arnold on November 9, 1826 in Prince George's County, MD. Daughter: Mary Jane Arnold (1836-1909). Husband Samuel died 1855 in Washington DC. Died August 1, 1863 in Washington DC, during the Civil War.
